entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: A legume crop (Arachis hypogaea L.) affected by bud necrosis disease in India

entities.name: BUD NECROSIS DISEASE
entities.description: A disease of peanut caused by a tospovirus

entities.name: TOSPOVIRUS
entities.description: A genus of viruses that includes the cause of bud necrosis disease

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the bud necrosis disease of peanut was studied

entities.name: PURIFICATION
entities.description: The process of isolating the tospovirus from the infected plant

entities.name: ELISA
entities.description: Enzyme-linked immunosorbent assay used for serological testing of the virus

entities.name: TOMATO SPOTTED WILT VIRUS
entities.description: A virus used for comparative serological testing against the peanut virus

entities.name: IMPATIENS NECROTIC SPOT VIRUS
entities.description: A virus used for comparative serological testing against the peanut virus

entities.name: ELECTRO-BLOT IMMUNOASSAY
entities.description: An immunoassay used to detect specific viral polypeptides

entities.name: BUD NECROSIS VIRUS
entities.description: The specific tospovirus identified as the cause of bud necrosis disease in India

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: The geographic region where bud necrosis virus appears to be restricted
